nasb.text: He overlaid the whole house with gold, until all the house was finished. Also the whole altar which was by the inner sanctuary he overlaid with gold.

esv.text: And he overlaid the whole house with gold, until all the house was finished. Also the whole altar that belonged to the inner sanctuary he overlaid with gold.

cnv.text: 他把整個的殿都貼上金子，直到整個的殿都貼完；在內殿的壇，整個都貼上了金子。

ccb.text: 殿内都贴上纯金，至圣所内的祭坛也都包上纯金。
